types1:Item.types1:Name: tf_TMS_01_SendAssignmentsWithErrorETQ
types1:Item.types1:Description: @operation=Send Trainings, @dataType= Workday Trainings, @source= SQL Server DB, @target= ETQ, @tfLocalPath= QMS\Workday, @additionalText= Process that runs every 5 minutes and processes cases that ended in error.

taskflow.name: tf_TMS_01_SendAssignmentsWithErrorETQ
taskflow.description: @operation=Send Trainings, @dataType= Workday Trainings, @source= SQL Server DB, @target= ETQ, @tfLocalPath= QMS\Workday, @additionalText= Process that runs every 5 minutes and processes cases that ended in error.

processObject.name: InternalInfaSubTaskflowField
processObject.description: This process object represents a subtaskflow type reference field.
